evals.prompt: Search the web for the latest news about Anthropic Claude using Grok
evals.expected: JSON output with mode=web, results array non-empty, each result has title+url+snippet, citations array non-empty

evals.description: X/Twitter search — recent tweets with date filter
evals.prompt: Find tweets about OpenAI from the last 7 days on X
evals.expected: JSON output with mode=x, results array non-empty, author field populated for at least some results, citations pointing to x.com or twitter.com URLs

evals.prompt: Search for 'test query' on the web using Grok with no API key configured
evals.expected: Non-zero exit code, stderr contains auth error or 401/403 message, no JSON results output

evals.prompt: Find recent tweets from @OpenAI on X
evals.expected: JSON output with mode=x, results filtered to OpenAI handle, author field shows OpenAI

evals.prompt: Give me just the URLs from a Grok web search for 'xAI API docs'
evals.expected: Plain text output, one URL per line, no JSON wrapper, all lines start with https://
